Terms of Service

Last updated: June 2025

1Acceptance of Terms

By using BingeKaro, you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the service.

2Service Description

BingeKaro provides AI-powered entertainment discovery and OTT streaming availability information. We do not host, stream, or distribute any content.

3User Conduct

You agree not to misuse the service, attempt to reverse engineer the recommendation engine, or use automated means to scrape content.

4Content Accuracy

Streaming availability information is provided on a best-effort basis. OTT availability changes frequently and we cannot guarantee accuracy at all times.

5Limitation of Liability

BingeKaro and Nyxen are not liable for any direct or indirect damages arising from use of the service. The service is provided as-is.
